title: Backpack Market
description: JSON Schema for the Backpack Exchange Market resource, extracted from the Backpack Exchange OpenAPI 3.0 specification.

baseSymbol.description: The base asset of the market.

quoteSymbol.description: The quote asset of the market.

fundingInterval.description: Funding interval for perpetuals in milliseconds.

fundingRateUpperBound.description:
Funding rate upper bound for perpetual markets. In basis points. E.g. 10
= 10bps

fundingRateLowerBound.description:
Funding rate lower bound for perpetual markets. In basis points. E.g.
-10 = -10bps

openInterestLimit.description: Maximum open interest limit for the market if the market is a future.

positionLimitWeight.description:
Position limit weight coefficient.
Used to calculate position limits when clearing a trade.

price.description: Defines the price rules for the order book.

allOf.description: Defines the price rules for the order book.

quantity.description: Defines the quantity rules for the order book.

allOf.description: Defines the quantity rules for the order book.

minPrice.description: Minimum price the order book will allow.

maxPrice.description: Maximum price the order book will allow.

maxMultiplier.description: Maximum allowed multiplier from last active price.

minMultiplier.description: Minimum allowed multiplier from last active price.

maxImpactMultiplier.description:
Maximum allowed impact multiplier from best offer. This
determines how far above the best ask a market buy can penetrate.

minImpactMultiplier.description:
Minimum allowed impact multiplier from best bid. This
determines how far below the best bid a market sell can penetrate.

meanMarkPriceBand.description:
Futures price band. Used to determine how far the price is allowed to
deviate from the mean mark price.

allOf.description:
Futures price band. Used to determine how far the price is allowed to
deviate from the mean mark price.

meanPremiumBand.description:
Futures price band. Used to determine how far the premium is allowed to
deviate from the mean premium.

allOf.description:
Futures price band. Used to determine how far the premium is allowed to
deviate from the mean premium.

borrowEntryFeeMaxMultiplier.description:
Maximum allowed multiplier move from last active price without incurring
an entry fee for spot margin.

borrowEntryFeeMinMultiplier.description:
Minimum allowed multiplier move from last active price without incurring
an entry fee for spot margin.

maxPriceUpdateMultiplier.description:
Maximum allowed multiplier for mark/index price updates relative to
the previous mark/index price. When set, an update is capped at
`prev * max_price_update_multiplier`.

minPriceUpdateMultiplier.description:
Minimum allowed multiplier for mark/index price updates relative to
the previous mark/index price. When set, an update is floored at
`prev * min_price_update_multiplier`.

maxMultiplier.description: Maximum allowed multiplier move from mean price.

minMultiplier.description: Minimum allowed multiplier move from mean price.

tolerancePct.description:
Maximum allowed deviation from the mean premium. E.g. if
`tolerance_pct` is 0.05 (5%), and the mean premium is 5%, then
orders will be prevented from being placed if the premium exceeds 10%.

minQuantity.description:
Minimum quantity the order book will allow.

For futures, this will be the threshold at which a position gets closed
and so it should be as close as possible, preferably equal, to the
`step_size`.

maxQuantity.description: Maximum quantity the order book will allow.
